steps.title: Find the sentence boundary
steps.content: The main clause says the poems have earned praise from leading contemporary writers. The phrase beginning with among them adds an example of one such writer, so it is supplementary rather than a new independent clause.

steps.title: Use supplementary punctuation
steps.content: A creates a fragment beginning with Among. B gives no punctuation at the boundary. C uses a semicolon before a supplementary phrase, but a semicolon must separate independent clauses. A comma correctly introduces the example phrase. The answer is D.
